scripts.dev: concurrently -n NEXT,ELECTRON -c blue,green "yarn --cwd frontend dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && yarn build:electron && electron ."
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -n BACKEND,WORKER,NEXT,ELECTRON -c magenta,yellow,blue,green "cd backend && .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8765" "cd backend && .venv/bin/python -m app.worker" "yarn --cwd frontend dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && yarn build:electron && electron ."
